name: playbooks_list
description: List all available playbooks. Returns name, title, and description for each playbook.

description.description: Short description of what the playbook does.

error.description: Error message if the listing failed.

name: playbooks_run_playbook
description: Run a playbook by name. Use the context parameter to brief the agent who will be executing the playbook with any information they need to do the right work.

context.description: Free-form briefing text for the playbook. Describe what the user wants, any relevant details, preferences, or constraints.

playbook.description: Name of the playbook that was run.

title.description: Title of the ticket assigned to the agents to do their work.

tickets.description: The created work tickets for the agent.

error.description: Error message if the run failed.
